properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are at home in my heart ‘Cause You loved me right from the start When I was refusing Your love kept pursuing

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Now that I’ve tasted Your love My heart just can’t get enough Jesus You have me You have me completely

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It’s Your love in my heart running over Everyday of my life I’ll draw closer

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Such a perfect love Oh You lift me higher Lighting up my way Everything is brighter With You everything is better With You I am right where I belong

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: No matter what I go through I’ll keep my eyes fixed on You Jesus You’re faithful And You are able

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Every part of my heart is now open Make Your home in my heart, You are welcome
